fields.name: station_id
fields.description: Unique identifier assigned by the network operator. Stable across all dataset versions.

fields.name: station_name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the station location (e.g. 'Portland Airport').

fields.name: latitude
fields.description: Geographic latitude of the station in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Positive values are north of the equator.

fields.name: longitude
fields.description: Geographic longitude of the station in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Positive values are east of the prime meridian.

fields.name: elevation_m
fields.description: Elevation of the station above mean sea level.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the station is currently operational and reporting data.

fields.name: commissioned_date
fields.description: Date the station began continuous operation.
